info.flavor: Veld Systems’ Keeper Pattern 5 is a common guard mech made famous after the platform’s performance during the Battle of Sing Rama Sing. During the battle, Audrey Reimaus of the Seraphs’ Company used a Keeper P5 to singlehandedly secure Rama City’s main uplift tower, thus guaranteeing an evacuation corridor for the city’s civilian population.
info.tactics: Barricades are at their best when locking down fast-moving targets. They can use their Mobile Printer to create hard cover for allies or to prevent melee mechs from moving through an area.
info.terse: Mobile controller that can lock down fast enemies and create hard cover.

on_hit.detail: Target is Slowed until the end of their next turn.

deployables.name: Print Cube
deployables.detail: Print a Size 2 cube in a free and adjacent area. The cube provides hard cover.

name: Shock Plating
effect: The Barricade has Resistance to kinetic damage.

name: Bulwark Mods
effect: The Barricade ignores difficult terrain and dangerous terrain.

active_effects.name: Bulwark Mods
active_effects.detail: You ignore difficult terrain and dangerous terrain.

actions.name: Drag Down
actions.detail: Make a tech attack against a character within Sensors. On a success, they take 2 AP Energy damage per space that they voluntarily move until the end of their next turn.

actions.name: Seismic Repulsor
actions.detail: All non-flying characters within a Burst 3 area must pass a Hull save or be knocked 3 spaces back from the Barricade and knocked Prone. The affected area becomes difficult terrain for the rest of the scene.

name: Extrudite
effect: The Barricade can print two separate cubes at a time with Mobile Printer, instead of one.

actions.name: Deploy Hunger/Pursuit Limpets
actions.detail: You rapidly print and deploy a field of tiny, mobile mines in a free Size 4 area adjacent to you. The affected area becomes difficult terrain; additionally, hostile characters that enter the area for the first time in a round or start their turn there must succeed on a Systems save or be Slowed until the end of their next turn.

deployables.name: Titan-Snare Drone
deployables.detail: This drone can be printed and deployed to any free adjacent space. When hostile characters move into or start their turn within range 3 of the drone, it emits a pulse, and they become Immobilized until the drone is destroyed.
